title: CSS @scope
description: Optimize a component library by using @scope to limit style application boundaries, preventing leaky selectors and unwanted inheritance
html:
Parent Card

Parent card content.

Nested Card

Nested card should not inherit parent card title styles.

validationRules.message: Nested card title should be dark gray, not blue (scope should prevent leaking)
Nested card title should be 16px (smaller than parent)

hints.text: @scope creates a styling boundary. The 'to' clause defines where styles stop applying, preventing them from leaking into nested instances.
Use '@scope (.scoped-card) to (.scoped-card .scoped-card)' to limit parent card styles. Add separate rules for .nested children.
@scope limits style application to a subtree, with an optional exclusion boundary.
